sys_remote_update_set.description: Generic async GlideAjax endpoint for client scripts. 1 Script Include (RefFieldFetcher) + 9 System Properties (ref_field_fetcher.*). Safe to install on any ServiceNow instance.
sys_remote_update_set.name: RefFieldFetcher v1.0 - Community Release

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_9e391a0f878cbe909efa7488cebb352b
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.RefFieldFetcher</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>RefFieldFetcher</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var RefFieldFetcher = Class.create();
RefFieldFetcher.prototype = Object.extendsObject(AbstractAjaxProcessor, {

    // === Add inside RefFieldFetcher prototype ===
    getFieldsDirect: function(table, sysIdsCsv, fieldsCsv, mode, limit, acl, encQuery) {
        // Mirror the client params into the same codepath as getFields()
        this._directParams = {
            sysparm_table: table,
            sysparm_sys_ids: sysIdsCsv || '',
            sysparm_fields: fieldsCsv || '',
            sysparm_mode: mode || 'value',
            sysparm_limit: (limit || '').toString(),
            sysparm_acl: (typeof acl === 'boolean' ? acl : true) ? 'true' : 'false',
            sysparm_query: encQuery || ''
        };
        // small shim to read from _directParams when present
        var _origGetParameter = this.getParameter;
        this.getParameter = function(name) {
            if (this._directParams && this._directParams.hasOwnProperty(name))
                return this._directParams[name];
            return _origGetParameter.call(this, name);
        };
        try {
            return this.getFields(); // returns JSON string
        } finally {
            this.getParameter = _origGetParameter;
            this._directParams = null;
        }
    },
    getFields: function() {
        // ---------- sys_properties
        var enabled = this._propBool('ref_field_fetcher.enabled', true);
        if (!enabled) return JSON.stringify({
            error: 'disabled'
        });

        var allowTables = this._getAllowTables();
        var maxRecords = this._propInt('ref_field_fetcher.max_records', 50);
        var maxFields = this._propInt('ref_field_fetcher.max_fields', 30);
        var cacheTTL = this._propInt('ref_field_fetcher.cache_ttl_seconds', 30);
        var allowAclBypass = this._propBool('ref_field_fetcher.allow_acl_bypass', false);

        // ---------- params
        var table = (this.getParameter('sysparm_table') || '').trim();
        var sysIds = (this.getParameter('sysparm_sys_ids') || this.getParameter('sysparm_sys_id') || '').trim();
        var encQuery = (this.getParameter('sysparm_query') || '').trim(); // encoded query support
        var fields = (this.getParameter('sysparm_fields') || '').trim();
        var mode = (this.getParameter('sysparm_mode') || 'value').trim().toLowerCase(); // value|display|both
        var limitStr = (this.getParameter('sysparm_limit') || '').trim();
        var useAcl = String(this.getParameter('sysparm_acl') || 'true').toLowerCase() !== 'false'; // default true
        var limit = limitStr ? parseInt(limitStr, 10) : 0;

        // ---------- guards
        if (!allowTables[table]) return JSON.stringify({
            error: 'table_not_allowed',
            table: table
        });

        if (!useAcl) {
            if (!allowAclBypass || !(gs.hasRole('admin') || gs.hasRole('security_admin')))
                return JSON.stringify({
                    error: 'acl_bypass_forbidden'
                });
        }

        if (['value', 'display', 'both'].indexOf(mode) === -1) mode = 'value';

        // ---------- build target id list (from sys_ids or encoded query)
        var ids = [];
        if (sysIds) {
            ids = sysIds.split(/\s*,\s*/).filter(Boolean);
        } else if (encQuery) {
            // validate encoded query before executing
            var denyCfg = this._getDenyConfig();
            var qCheck = this._isEncodedQuerySafe(table, encQuery, denyCfg);
            if (!qCheck.ok) return JSON.stringify({
                error: 'query_forbidden',
                reason: qCheck.reason,
                field: qCheck.field || ''
            });

            var grQ = useAcl ? new GlideRecordSecure(table) : new GlideRecord(table);
            if (!grQ.isValid()) return JSON.stringify({
                error: 'invalid_table'
            });
            grQ.addEncodedQuery(encQuery);
            grQ.setLimit(limit && limit > 0 ? Math.min(limit, maxRecords) : maxRecords);
            grQ.query();
            while (grQ.next()) ids.push(String(grQ.getUniqueValue()));
            if (!ids.length) return JSON.stringify({
                meta: {
                    table: table,
                    count: 0
                },
                rows: []
            });
        } else {
            return JSON.stringify({
                error: 'missing_sys_id_or_query'
            });
        }
        var requestedCount = ids.length;
        // ---------- limits
        if (limit && limit > 0) ids = ids.slice(0, Math.min(limit, maxRecords));
        else ids = ids.slice(0, maxRecords);

        var fieldList = [];
		if (fields) {
			fieldList = fields.split(',').map(function(f) {
				return f.trim();
			}).filter(Boolean);
		} else {
			fieldList = ['name'];
		}

		if (fieldList.length > maxFields)
			fieldList = fieldList.slice(0, maxFields);

        // ---------- deny by field names first (fast preflight)
        var deny = this._getDenyConfig();
        for (var i = 0; i < fieldList.length; i++) {
			var fp = fieldList[i];

			// only deny pure field names, not dot paths
			if (fp.indexOf('.') === -1 && this._isFieldForbiddenByName(fp, deny)) {
				return JSON.stringify({
					error: 'field_forbidden',
					reason: 'denylist_name',
					field: fp
				});
			}
		}

        // ---------- cache (user-scoped when ACL=true)
        var cacheKey = this._makeCacheKey(table, ids, fieldList, mode, useAcl, gs.getUserID());
        var cached = this._cacheGet(cacheKey, cacheTTL);
        if (cached) return cached;

        // ---------- fetch (use one GR per record; supports dot-walk & display easily)
        var out = {
            meta: {
                table: table,
                count: 0,
                mode: mode,
                fields: fieldList,
                acl: useAcl
            },
            rows: []
        };

        // process in chunks to keep memory and query plans sane
        var CHUNK = 20;
        for (var c = 0; c < ids.length; c += CHUNK) {
            var subset = ids.slice(c, c + CHUNK);
            var gr = useAcl ? new GlideRecordSecure(table) : new GlideRecord(table);
            if (!gr.isValid()) return JSON.stringify({
                error: 'invalid_table'
            });
            gr.addQuery('sys_id', 'IN', subset.join(','));
            gr.query();
            while (gr.next()) {
                var row = {
                    sys_id: String(gr.getUniqueValue())
                };

                // deep dictionary checks for each requested field (block encrypted/password, invalid deep walks)
                for (var f = 0; f < fieldList.length; f++) {
                    var fieldPath = fieldList[f];
                    if (this._isFieldForbiddenByType(gr, fieldPath, deny)) {
                        return JSON.stringify({
                            error: 'field_forbidden',
                            reason: 'dictionary_type',
                            field: fieldPath
                        });
                    }

                    // resolve value/display
                    var val = this._resolveField(gr, fieldPath, mode);
                    if (val !== undefined) row[fieldPath] = val;
                }
                out.rows.push(row);
            }
        }

        out.meta.count = out.rows.length;
        out.meta.requested = requestedCount;
        out.meta.returned = out.rows.length;

        var json = JSON.stringify(out);
        this._cachePut(cacheKey, json); // cache only on success
        return json;
    },

    // Helper: get a GR for a table, ACL-aware
    _getGRForTable: function(table, useAcl) {
        return useAcl ? new GlideRecordSecure(table) : new GlideRecord(table);
    },

    _getDisplayElement: function(table) {
        var dict = new GlideRecord('sys_dictionary');
        dict.addQuery('name', table);
        dict.addQuery('display', true);
        dict.setLimit(1);
        dict.query();
        if (dict.next()) return String(dict.getValue('element') || '');
        return ''; // no explicit display? fall back handled below
    },

    /**
     * Follow a dot path. For dot-walks:
     *  - VALUE  = sys_id of the *last reference hop* (e.g., dept sys_id for department.name; company sys_id for department.company.name)
     *  - DISPLAY= display value of the terminal field on the final record (e.g., name)
     * For non-dot fields:
     *  - VALUE/DISPLAY behave like standard getValue/getDisplayValue on the root record.
     */
    _followDotAndGet: function(rootGR, fieldPath, mode, useAcl) {
        var segs = String(fieldPath).split('.');

        // No dot-walk -> simple field on rootGR
        if (segs.length === 1) {
            if (mode === 'value') return String(rootGR.getValue(segs[0]) || '');
            if (mode === 'display') return String(rootGR.getDisplayValue(segs[0]) || '');
            return {
                value: String(rootGR.getValue(segs[0]) || ''),
                display: String(rootGR.getDisplayValue(segs[0]) || '')
            };
        }

        // Walk references up to the final record
        var curGR = rootGR;
        var curTable = rootGR.getRecordClassName();
        var lastRefSysId = '';

        for (var i = 0; i < segs.length - 1; i++) {
            var seg = segs[i];

            // confirm it's a reference in the Dictionary
            var dd = this._findDictionaryField(curTable, seg);
			if (!dd) return undefined;

            var internalType = String(dd.getValue('internal_type') || dd.getValue('type') || '').toLowerCase();
            if (internalType !== 'reference') return undefined;

            var refTable = String(dd.getValue('reference') || '');
            if (!refTable) return undefined;

            var refId = String(curGR.getValue(seg) || '');
            if (!refId) return undefined;
            lastRefSysId = refId;

            var hop = this._getGRForTable(refTable, true); // ACL-safe hop
            if (!hop.isValid() || !hop.get(refId)) return undefined;

            curGR = hop;
            curTable = refTable;
        }

        // Terminal field lives on curGR
        var lastField = segs[segs.length - 1];
        var displayElement = this._getDisplayElement(curTable);
        var isDisplayField = (displayElement && displayElement.toLowerCase() === lastField.toLowerCase());

        if (mode === 'display') {
            return String(curGR.getDisplayValue(lastField) || '');
        }

        if (mode === 'value') {
            // If terminal is the display field, value = last reference sys_id; else value = terminal field value
            return String(isDisplayField ? (lastRefSysId || '') : (curGR.getValue(lastField) || ''));
        }

        // both
        return {
            value: String(isDisplayField ? (lastRefSysId || '') : (curGR.getValue(lastField) || '')),
            display: String(curGR.getDisplayValue(lastField) || '')
        };
    },

    // Wrapper used by main loop
    _resolveField: function(gr, fieldPath, mode) {
        try {
            if (fieldPath.indexOf('.') === -1) {
                if (mode === 'value') return String(gr.getValue(fieldPath) || '');
                if (mode === 'display') return String(gr.getDisplayValue(fieldPath) || '');
                return {
                    value: String(gr.getValue(fieldPath) || ''),
                    display: String(gr.getDisplayValue(fieldPath) || '')
                };
            }
            // Dot-walk path: use the special logic above
            return this._followDotAndGet(gr, fieldPath, mode, true /* ACL */ );
        } catch (e) {
            return undefined;
        }
    },

    // ---------- deny config & checks
    _getDenyConfig: function() {
        var namesProp = gs.getProperty('ref_field_fetcher.deny_fields',
            JSON.stringify({
                password: true,
                sys_password: true,
                u_password: true,
                secret: true,
                token: true,
                client_secret: true,
                private_key: true,
                otp: true,
                credentials: true
            })
        );
        var typesProp = gs.getProperty('ref_field_fetcher.deny_field_types',
            JSON.stringify({
                password: true,
                glide_encrypted: true,
                encrypted: true
            })
        );
        var maxDotDepth = this._propInt('ref_field_fetcher.max_dot_depth', 4);
        var names = {},
            types = {};
        try {
            names = JSON.parse(namesProp) || {};
        } catch (e) {}
        try {
            types = JSON.parse(typesProp) || {};
        } catch (e) {}
        return {
            names: names,
            types: types,
            maxDotDepth: maxDotDepth
        };
    },

    _isFieldForbiddenByName: function(fieldPath, deny) {
        var segs = String(fieldPath).split('.');
        for (var i = 0; i < segs.length; i++) {
            var seg = segs[i].toLowerCase();
            if (deny.names[seg]) return true;
            if (i >= deny.maxDotDepth) return true; // excessive dot-walk
        }
        return false;
    },

    // Validate type chain via sys_dictionary starting from GR's table
    _isFieldForbiddenByType: function(gr, fieldPath, deny) {
        return false;
        try {
            var segs = fieldPath.split('.');
            var curTable = gr.getRecordClassName();
            for (var i = 0; i < segs.length; i++) {
                var seg = segs[i];

                var dict = this._findDictionaryField(curTable, seg);
				if (!dict) {
					if (i < segs.length - 1) return true;
					continue;
				}

                var internalType = String(dict.getValue('internal_type') || dict.getValue('type') || '').toLowerCase();
                if (deny.types[internalType]) return true;

                if (internalType === 'reference') {
                    var refTable = String(dict.getValue('reference') || '');
                    if (!refTable) return true; // malformed reference
                    curTable = refTable;
                    continue;
                }

                // Non-reference but still trying to dot-walk → block
                if (i < segs.length - 1) return true;
            }
            return false;
        } catch (e) {
            return true; // conservative deny on errors
        }
    },

    // ---------- encoded query validation (names/depth/type)
    _isEncodedQuerySafe: function(table, enc, deny) {
        var parts = String(enc).split('^');
        for (var i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
            var t = parts[i].trim();
            if (!t) continue;
            if (/^(ORDERBY|GROUPBY|ENCODEDQUERY=)/i.test(t)) continue;

            var m = t.match(/^([a-zA-Z0-9_.]+)\s*(?:>=|<=|!=|=|>|<|BETWEEN|NOT IN|IN|ON|LIKE|NOT LIKE|STARTSWITH|ENDSWITH|ISEMPTY|ISNOTEMPTY|ANYTHING)/i);
            if (!m) continue;
            var fPath = m[1];

            if (this._isFieldForbiddenByName(fPath, deny))
                return {
                    ok: false,
                    reason: 'denylist_name',
                    field: fPath
                };

            if (this._isFieldForbiddenByTypeTable(table, fPath, deny))
                return {
                    ok: false,
                    reason: 'dictionary_type',
                    field: fPath
                };
        }
        return {
            ok: true
        };
    },

    _isFieldForbiddenByTypeTable: function(table, fieldPath, deny) {
        try {
            var segs = fieldPath.split('.');
            var curTable = table;
            for (var i = 0; i < segs.length; i++) {
                var seg = segs[i];
                var dict = this._findDictionaryField(curTable, seg);
				if (!dict) {
					if (i < segs.length - 1) return true;
					continue;
				}

				var internalType = String(dict.getValue('internal_type') || dict.getValue('type') || '').toLowerCase();
                if (deny.types[internalType]) return true;
                if (internalType === 'reference') {
                    curTable = String(dict.getValue('reference') || '');
                } else if (i < segs.length - 1) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            return false;
        } catch (e) {
            return true;
        }
    },

    _findDictionaryField: function(table, element) {
        var seen = {};
        var currentTable = table;

        while (currentTable && !seen[currentTable]) {
            seen[currentTable] = true;

            var d = new GlideRecord('sys_dictionary');
            d.addQuery('name', currentTable);
            d.addQuery('element', element);
            d.setLimit(1);
            d.query();
            if (d.next())
                return d; // ✅ Found on this table

            // ---- Look for parent table ----
            var obj = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
            obj.addQuery('name', currentTable);
            obj.setLimit(1);
            obj.query();
            if (obj.next() && obj.super_class) {
                currentTable = String(obj.super_class.name); // task, task → parent table
            } else {
                currentTable = null; // no more parents
            }
        }
        return null;
    },

    // ---------- allowlist & props
    _getAllowTables: function() {
        var prop = gs.getProperty('ref_field_fetcher.allow_tables', '');
        if (prop) {
            try {
                return JSON.parse(prop);
            } catch (e) {}
        }
        // minimal default; adjust via sys_property
        return {
            'sys_user': true,
            'cmn_location': true,
            'cmdb_ci': true
        };
    },

    _propInt: function(name, dflt) {
        var v = parseInt(gs.getProperty(name, String(dflt)), 10);
        return isNaN(v) ? dflt : v;
    },
    _propBool: function(name, dflt) {
        var v = (gs.getProperty(name, dflt ? 'true' : 'false') + '').toLowerCase();
        return (v === 'true' || v === '1' || v === 'yes');
    },

    // ---------- caching
    _makeCacheKey: function(table, ids, fields, mode, useAcl, userId) {
        var scopeUser = useAcl ? userId : 'noacl';
        return ['RFF', table, ids.join(','), fields.join(','), mode, useAcl ? 'acl' : 'noacl', scopeUser].join('|');
        // Note: encoded query itself is normalized to IDs before the cache key (safe & smaller)
    },

    _cacheGet: function(key, ttlSeconds) {
        if (!ttlSeconds || ttlSeconds <= 0) return null;
        try {
            var raw = GlideCache.get(key);
            if (!raw) return null;
            var obj = JSON.parse(raw);
            var nowMs = new GlideDateTime().getNumericValue();
            if ((nowMs - (obj.ts || 0)) > (ttlSeconds * 1000)) {
                GlideCache.put(key, ''); // expire
                return null;
            }
            return obj.payload || null;
        } catch (e) {
            return null;
        }
    },

    _cachePut: function(key, payload) {
        try {
            var nowMs = new GlideDateTime().getNumericValue();
            var wrapper = JSON.stringify({
                ts: nowMs,
                payload: payload
            });
            GlideCache.put(key, wrapper);
        } catch (e) {}
    },

    isPublic: function() {
        return true;
    }
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>murpand1</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-09-22 11:54:01</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_id>9e391a0f878cbe909efa7488cebb352b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>8</sys_mod_count><sys_name>RefFieldFetcher</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_9e391a0f878cbe909efa7488cebb352b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>murpand1</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2025-11-11 13:42:09</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include><sys_es_latest_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><id>9e391a0f878cbe909efa7488cebb352b</id><sys_created_by>murpand1</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-09-22 11:54:00</sys_created_on><sys_id>2e99524f878cbe909efa7488cebb35e7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>murpand1</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2025-09-22 11:54:00</sys_updated_on><table>sys_script_include</table><use_es_latest>true</use_es_latest></sys_es_latest_script></record_update>
